summary: The user feels overwhelmed by having too many tasks this week and is unsure where to start. They are seeking a simple plan to organize their work effectively.
key_points: User has too many tasks this week.
User feels overwhelmed and uncertain about where to begin.
User needs a simple, organized plan to manage their work.
helpful_response: To manage your workload effectively, start by listing all your tasks. Then, prioritize them based on deadlines and importance. Break larger tasks into smaller, manageable steps. Create a daily schedule allocating time blocks for each task, and focus on completing one task at a time. This simple plan can help reduce overwhelm and improve productivity.
